jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at NoBroker
jsonLd.description:
Join the NoBroker family as a Frontend Developer in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
